jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at 99acres - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
